case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH BANK N.A. VS. EDITH R SVETINA et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SVETINA, EDITH R
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH BANK N.A. SERVED AUG-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SVETINA, EDITH R
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585); 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550); 3. ATTORNEY'S FEES & COSTS (CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH BANK N.A.
